title: Pride
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'pride'?
Are you a proud person?
What achievement are you most proud of?
Who are you most proud of?
What do you take great pride in doing?
When was the last time you were very proud of yourself?
Do you think you were always a source of great pride for your parents?
Do you think carefully about your actions to maintain your family pride?
What do you do to restore your pride after it has been wounded?
Fulton Sheen said: "Pride is an admission of weakness; it secretly fears all competition and dreads all rivals." Do you agree?
What is pride?
Are you proud of your country?
Do you feel more pride in yourself or in others?
Are you proud of your heritage?
When can pride be dangerous?
Is pride in yourself a sin?
Which of your characteristics are you most proud of?
Does your pride ever stop you from asking others for help?
Have you ever had to swallow your pride?
John Ruskin said: "Pride is at the bottom of all great mistakes." Do you agree with him?
